text.title: App Store Optimization (ASO) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: App is on Apple/Play AND founder controls metadata AND keyword data available?

branch.when: app_on_store == true AND controls_metadata == true AND keyword_data_available == true
